title: List Block
description: Bullet or numbered list. Items are strings, or objects with text + nested content blocks. Items pass through inline markup.

items.description: Items: strings (leaves) or objects with text + content[] blocks belonging to the same item

content.description: Block-level content rendered inside the same list item (paragraphs, sub-lists, callouts, quotes, tables, raw latex)

type.description: Allowed nested block types. Other block types only make sense at top level.

spacing_before.description: Override the vertical space above this block. Any LaTeX dimension string ('1em', '0.5cm', '0em'). Not validated — an invalid dimension fails at compile time. Wins over block_settings and the built-in default.

spacing_after.description: Override the vertical space below this block. Same semantics as spacing_before.
